rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 28, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH CHATMAN Notice Of Motion For Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Hearing Required. By no later than 8:00 a.m. on August 28, 2010 Defendants to file a supplemental brief (and serve a copy on Plaintiff) limited to the following: (1) equitable easement - cite authority involving obtaining equitable easements for encroachments built without permit and subject to DBI existing NOVs and Orders of Abatement. No argument, pin cites only; and (2) Irrevocable license - (a) authority standing for the proposition that a subsequent owner may grant a license; (b) facts (with evidence if available at this time) that Joscelyn was (i) Plaintiff's predecessor in interest as owner; and (ii) was Plaintiff's agent prior to obtaining an ownership interest in the property; (c) cases standing for the proposition that an oral permission by an agent may create an irrevocable license. No argument, pin cites only. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: IAN DUGGAN ET AL VS. GARY TSIFRIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 28, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG, JEFF WINTER, CLAUDIA WINTER Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Final Award is confirmed. The prevailing party determination, costs and fees shall be made by the arbitrator. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LUMBERMAN CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY, INC. VS. 1990 FOLSOM HOUSING ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 28, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT 1990 FOLSOM HOUSING ASSOCIATES, LP, AZUL WORKS HOLDING, INC., NIBBI BROS, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support each cause of action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LUMBERMAN CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY, INC. VS. 1990 FOLSOM HOUSING ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' 1990 Folsom Housing Associates, Lp, Nibbi Bros, Inc., And Azul Works Holding, Inc'S Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 28, 2019 line 7. Defendants' 1990 Folsom Housing Associates, Lp, Nibbi Bros, Inc., And Azul Works Holding, Inc'S Motion To Strike GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for attorney's fees. Plaintiff fails to allege any basis for recovery of such fees. Plaintiff may bring a motion for leave to amend when Plaintiff is able to allege in good faith facts giving rise to this request. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SYNERGICITY, INC. ET AL VS. CARL WESCOTT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendants, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 28, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF SYNERGICITY, INC., KEN MATUSOW Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendants, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses to From Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $900 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CLARK MCBRIDE VS. NELSON ACOSTA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 28, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT NELSON ACOSTA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint addressing all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)
